The current visit record indicates that the patient has been diagnosed with asthma and acidosis, and the medications prescribed do not include any that are specifically related to the management of lipid disorders. There is no mention of any lipid abnormalities, such as hypercholesterolemia or hyperlipidemia, nor is there any evidence of ongoing management for a lipid disorder. Since there is no explicit evidence of a lipid disorder present in this visit, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the patient's next hospital visit.
